posts.author: Christoph (Christoph)
posts.cookedHtml:
One of the most handy features of Atlassian are smart links, i.e. when you insert a ticket link from Jira in Confluence, it formats it in a way that you can see the status of the ticket right away.

I am missing this feature in Workdocs. It would be great if there was a way to embed items from Monday boards in Workdocs, besides inserting a table widget.

It would be kind of the other way around of creating items from text in Workdocs (create element). When you do this, you have a “smart” link to the item in Workdocs. You can click on it an the item card pops up. It would be great if this could also be achieved by inserting a link to an existing board item.
